description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!
Super Productivity is an advanced todo list app with integrated Timeboxing and time tracking capabilities. It also comes with integrations for Jira, GitLab, GitHub and Open Project.
The world's best AI personal assistant for email. Open source app to help you reach inbox zero fast.
A focused launcher for your desktop - native, fast, extensible
A free, open-source developer workspace. Snippets, notes, HTTP requests, calculations, and dev tools in one local-first app.
【Zotero AI 管家】调用大模型，自动精读论文库里的论文，总结为Zotero笔记。支持主流大模型平台！您只需像往常一样把文献丢进 Zotero， 管家会自动帮您精读论文，将文章揉碎了总结为笔记，让您“十分钟完全了解”这篇论文！
A complete Getting Things Done (GTD) productivity system for desktop and mobile.

NEO Emacs (WIP): A GPU-powered Emacs written in Rust with a modern display engine.  Aiming for modern design/multi-threaded Elisp, 10x performance and 100% Emacs compatibility. 🚀  Inline 4K images/4K videos/WPEWebKit using GPU acceleration, DMA-BUF, ZERO-COPY. Rich animation effects support.
Atom Agent, automate your workflows by talking to an AI — and let it remember, search, and handle tasks like a real assistant
Turn AI conversations into organized, reusable workflows — across major AI platforms. | 把 AI 对话转化为可组织、可复用的工作流，适用于主流 AI 平台

Straightforward realtime kanban boards management for intuitive task tracking. 4ga Boards features an elegant dark mode, collapsible todo lists, and multitasking tools to supercharge your team's productivity.
Foqos allows you to lock apps behind the tap of a NFC tag or scan of a QR code. Free and open source alternative to Brick, Opal, Unpluq, Blok and more!
Project management natively in your Obsidian vault. Table, Gantt, and Kanban views with subtasks, dependencies, time tracking, and custom fields — all stored as plain Markdown. No external services.
